originalTitle: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) – Open-Source AI CAD
content: Hey HN! I'm Zach from Adam ( https://adam.new/ ). We're building AI agents for mechanical CAD software. We’ve built the company on two fundamental beliefs: - AI will be the primary medium for creating mechanical designs just like it is in software today. - The best paradigm for CAD generation is to generate CAD as code (text -> code -> CAD). We’re building CADAM, an open source Text to CAD platform. It's a React app (TanStack Start) with a Supabase backend for auth, database, and file storage. Think of it like AI TinkerCAD. Demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iESOr7EGWqk Try it: https://adam.new/cadam/ What it does: - Generates parametric 3D models from natural language, with support for both text prompts and image references. - Outputs OpenSCAD code with automatically extracted parameters that surface as interactive sliders for instant dimension tweaking - Exports as .STL or .SCAD (plus OBJ, GLB/GLTF, FBX, and DXF) Under the hood: - One agentic endpoint with two modes that swap system prompts and tools: a parametric mode that writes/edits OpenSCAD via a build_parametric_model tool, and a mesh mode that generates 3D textured meshes. - Simple parameter tweaks bypass the model entirely; adjusting a slider does a deterministic regex update on the SCAD source, requiring no LLM call. - Model-agnostic via the Vercel AI SDK: Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), and OpenAI/others through OpenRouter, with adaptive thinking auto-enabled on newer models. Surprisingly, in our evals Gemini 3.1 Pro is the top model. - Runs fully in-browser by compiling OpenSCAD to WebAssembly (in a Web Worker, so the UI never blocks) and rendering with Three.js via React Three Fiber - Supports BOSL, BOSL2, and MCAD libraries, plus custom font support (Geist) for text in models Future improvements: - Support both build123d and CadQuery. This will allow us to move beyond CSG primitives to constraint-driven modeling and provide direct comparisons to other code-as-CAD primitives. - Better spatial context: UI for face/edge selection and viewport image integration to give LLMs spatial understanding You can clone the repo and run it locally! Contributions are very welcome.
chineseTitle: 推出 HN：Adam (YC W25) – 开源 AI CAD
chineseContent: 嘿，HN！我是来自 Adam ( https://adam.new/ ) 的扎克。我们正在为机械 CAD 软件构建人工智能代理。我们建立公司的基础是两个基本信念： - 人工智能将成为创建机械设计的主要媒介，就像当今的软件一样。 - CAD 生成的最佳范例是将 CAD 生成为代码（文本 -> 代码 -> CAD）。我们正在构建 CADAM，一个开源文本转 CAD 平台。它是一个 React 应用程序 (TanStack Start)，带有用于身份验证、数据库和文件存储的 Supabase 后端。可以将其想象为 AI TinkerCAD。演示：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iESOr7EGWqk 尝试一下：https://adam.new/cadam/ 它的作用： - 从自然语言生成参数化 3D 模型，支持文本提示和图像引用。 - 输出带有自动提取参数的 OpenSCAD 代码，这些参数显示为交互式滑块，用于即时尺寸调整 - 导出为 .STL 或 .SCAD（加上 OBJ、GLB/GLTF、FBX 和 DXF） 底层： - 一个代理端点，具有两种交换系统提示和工具的模式：一种是通过 build_parametric_model 工具写入/编辑 OpenSCAD 的参数化模式，另一种是生成 3D 纹理网格的网格模式。 - 简单的参数调整完全绕过模型；调整滑块会对 SCAD 源进行确定性正则表达式更新，无需 LLM 调用。 - 通过 Vercel AI SDK 实现模型无关：Anthropic (Claude)、Google (Gemini) 和 OpenAI/其他通过 OpenRouter，在较新的模型上自动启用自适应思维。令人惊讶的是，在我们的评估中，Gemini 3.1 Pro 是顶级型号。 - 通过将 OpenSCAD 编译为 WebAssembly（在 Web Worker 中，因此 UI 永远不会阻塞）并通过 React Three Fiber 使用 Three.js 进行渲染，从而完全在浏览器中运行 - 支持 BOSL、BOSL2 和 MCAD 库，以及模型中文本的自定义字体支持 (Geist) 未来改进：
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
